title: Harden DAO route mutation
description: Resolve review findings in Rust DAO processing: treat Path Lifetime zero as withdrawal while advancing replay state; remove stale routes when newer topology is incomplete or cyclic; fail closed on malformed or duplicate Target/Transit options and unsupported non-/128 targets; generate RFC-correct circular DAO sequence rollover.
acceptance_criteria: Independent literal DAO tests prove withdrawal, stale-route invalidation after loops/incomplete chains, immediate malformed-option rejection, duplicate rejection, non-/128 rejection, and 127->0 generation/replay handling; no route mutation occurs before scope and parse validation; tests, Clippy, and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Implemented RFC-derived fixes with literal regression tests; combined gates pass 99 lichen-rpl tests, 143 lichen-node std tests, RPL all-feature Clippy, formatting, and repeated independent review cycles.
